titleStmt.title: SII 18.78: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 78. (B.K. No. 78 of 1933-34.) ASUṆḌI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up against the front wall of the temple of Kallēśvara

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva and is dated in Śaka 996, Ānanda, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, Sunday, Amāvāsyā. The date is irregular. In the cyclic year cited, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti occurred on Wednesday, 24th December, A.D. 1074 and the Amāvāsyā (of the month Pushya) ended on Saturday, the 20th December.

It registers a gift of land made by ūragāvuṇḍa Bīragāvuṇḍa for offerings and worship of god Kalidēva. The recipient of the gift was Sōvarāsi-paṇḍita. It is stated that at that time Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Udayāditya-Gaṅgapermāḍi was governing Banavāsī Twelve-thousand and Sāntaḷige One-thousand and Mahāsāmanta Gōyimmarasa (also called Gōvimarasa) of the Chikkamba family was the nārgāvuṇḍa of Sattaḷige Seventy. The latter is also stated to have made a gift of land to god Kalidēva of Paśuṇḍi (modern Asuṇḍi).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namaḥstuṁbisirastuṁgacaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhaṁ
mūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē © Āvāvāgamadoḷagaṁ bhāvisi nōḍuvaḍe
tāve pariṇatareniparkkēvaḷame sōvarāsigaḷī vasumatiyoḷage negaḻdaramaḷacaritraru .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithuvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanai
kamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkatāraṁ
baraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda ma
hāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kuvaḷālapuravarēśvaraṁ nandagirinātha madagajēṁdralāṁchana padmā vatī
labdhavaraprasādaṁ nanniyagangaṁ jayamattaraṁgaṁ nāvūdisamastaprasastisahitaṁ
śrīmadudayādityagaṁgapermmūḍidēvaru banavāsi pannirccāsiramumaṁ sāntaḷige sā
yiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadināḷuttamire . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahā
śabda mahāsāmanta jayāṁganākānta vairimanneyabēṁTekāṟaṁ parabaḷasūṟekāṟaṁ
gōtrapavitraṁ sujanaikamitraṁ ripuhṛdayasellaṁ duṣṭāśvamallaṁ kōdaṇḍarāmaṁ saṁ
grāmabhīma maṟasi kāduva manneyara mūganarivaṁ piridittu maṟevaṁ saurya
maṁ meṟevaṁ cikkaṁbakuḷānvaya śrīpraṇamēsvaradēvapādapaṁkajabhramara nā
mādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrī manmahāsāmantaṁ gōyimmarasar
sattaḷigeḻpattake nārggāvuṇḍugeyyattamire . © Asvarakuḷati
ḷakaṁ . © © sivabhaktaṁ dāḷiganantavanagrajaneṟeganavana taneyaṁ bēḷaṁ
gavudāttakīrtti saṁkiganavana magaṁ cāvanavana taneyaṁ bīraṁ . © bīraṁ sama
stajanakupakāraṁ paranārīdūranāśritajanakādhāraṁ virōdhibaḷasaṁhā
raṁ jayadhīranī dharāmaṇḍaḷadoḷ . Antenisi negaḻda bīrana kānte mahā
satige bammikabbege nayadiṁ śantōsamodave puṭṭidananantaguṇaṁ saṁka
neseva gōtrapavitraṁ . vacanaṁ . Antu bīragāvuṇḍanēkabhōgadinūragā
vuṇḍugeyyuttamire . © . sakavarṣa 996 neya Ānanda saṁvatsaraṁ
pravarttisuttire Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiĀdityavāra Amavāse
dvitīpātadandu . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamō
nānuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇarappa śrīmat sōvarāsipaṇḍitargge bīra
gāvuṇḍaṁ kalidēvasvāmidēvaraṁgabhōgakke kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi
yūriṁ mūḍaṇa kariyaṁgeṟehaḷḷanā keṟeya keḷageraḍu kaḍiya
mēreyāgoḷagaṇa gardde beddaleya sthaḷavaṁgeyyumaṁ . mattamūriṁ baḍagaleraḍu
mattalereyumaṁ . piriya kereya keḷage yirppattaydu kamma garddeyu
ma . Eraḍu maneya nelasaṇamumaṁ sarvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭa . © © śrīmanmahāsā
manta gōvimarasar . paśuṇḍiya kalidēvasvāmige kadirmiḍiya suḷḷagaṭṭada mūḍaṇa
kōḍiyalu biṭṭa vare maneya nelasaṇaṁ nālku Ī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷi
sidavaṁ vāraṇāsi śravargghyatīrtthaprayāgeyoḷ sāśirvva
r brāhmaṇargge sā ya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnalu
kaṭṭisi dānaṁ geyda vakku . Iṁtī dharmmavanāvanōrvanaḷivanu mā
ḍidavaraloḍaṁ baṭṭanu vāraṇāsi gurukṣētradoḷ sāśirvvar brāhmaṇaru
mana sāśira kavileyanaḷida paṁcamahāpātakanaku . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmma
sētunripāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷaniyōdbhavadbhiḥ . svadatta paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vaśuṁdharā saṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi ©
yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadāphaḷaṁ . © [lu ?]
nāluku suṁkadavaru gātrakkendu bēṟe naḍeyi suvar . vima
Digital edition of SII 18.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
